---

## Why It Works

It took a contrarian take on what most entrepreneurs talk about. All of the gurus preach "learning" but flipping it to make it about unlearning creates a fresh angle. There are lots of opportunities to do this with your content.

## Template

The most valuable skill in [YEAR] isn't [SKILL A].
It's [SKILL B].
Here are [NUMBER] things successful people are actively [ACTION]:
1. [ITEM 1]
[STATEMENT ABOUT ITEM 1]
[ALTERNATIVE PERSPECTIVE ON ITEM 1]
2. [ITEM 2]
[STATEMENT ABOUT ITEM 2]
[ALTERNATIVE PERSPECTIVE ON ITEM 2]
3. [ITEM 3]
[STATEMENT ABOUT ITEM 3]
[ALTERNATIVE PERSPECTIVE ON ITEM 3]
4. [ITEM 4]
[STATEMENT ABOUT ITEM 4]
[ALTERNATIVE PERSPECTIVE ON ITEM 4]
5. [ITEM 5]
[STATEMENT ABOUT ITEM 5]
[ALTERNATIVE PERSPECTIVE ON ITEM 5]
I had to [ACTION] [DURATION] of [EXPERIENCE] to [RESULT].
It was [DESCRIPTION 1].
It was [DESCRIPTION 2].
It was [DESCRIPTION 3].
What [TYPE OF THING] are you [ACTION]?
Share it below.

## Example

The most valuable skill in 2024 isn't traditional advertising.
It's content marketing.
Here are 5 things successful marketers are actively embracing:
1. User-generated content
Branded messages are losing trust.
Customer stories are the new gold.
2. AI-powered personalization
Generic campaigns are dead.
Tailored experiences drive engagement.
3. Video marketing
Long-form content is struggling.
Short-form videos capture attention.
4. Social listening
Broadcasting is outdated.
Real-time conversation shapes strategy.
5. Purpose-driven marketing
Profit-only focus alienates customers.
Values alignment builds loyalty.
I had to unlearn years of old-school marketing tactics to stay relevant in the digital age.
It was challenging.
It was eye-opening.
It was rewarding.
What outdated marketing practice are you leaving behind?
Share it below.
